title: OzoneDepletionFactor
description: OzoneDepletionFactor: Single value indicator for Ozone Depletion, measured in kg CFC-11 eq, refers to the substances that destroy ozone molecules.

Value.description: Value for this single factor indicator. Property has a quantity of type OzoneDepletionPerQuantity measured in [kg CFC11 eq per unit].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
